title: Starlight Vanilla plus modpack
description: Lightweight Fabric modpack with expanded worldgen, improved combat, and immersive survival tweaks for vanilla+ adventurers
body:
## ✨ Overview
This Fabric-based modpack is designed for players who love **exploration**, **RPG-style gameplay**, and **immersive survival mechanics** — all while maintaining performance for both singleplayer and multiplayer use.
Featuring revamped terrain, exciting combat additions, and quality-of-life tools, it’s the perfect blend of Vanilla+ and adventure.
this modpack is also required to join starlight smp and also if you want you can improve your singeplayer experience with this modpack 

## 🌍 World Generation & Exploration
- **Terralith**: Beautiful, natural terrain overhauls with hundreds of biomes.
- **Structory**: Adds hand-crafted structures that blend into vanilla-like environments.
- **Dungeons & Taverns**: Populates the world with unique dungeons and themed buildings.
- **Variants & Ventures**: Additional mobs, items, and biome variety for a dynamic world.
## ⚔️ Combat & Equipment Enhancements
- **CombatPlus Core**: Modernized combat mechanics.
- **Dual Swords**, **Axes Are Weapons**, **Takes Armory**: Diverse weapon types and improved combat dynamics.
- **Additional Armoury**: New armor types to match your playstyle.
## 🧰 Quality of Life & Gameplay Tweaks
- **FallingTree**: Chop entire trees with a single swing.
- **Carry On**: Pick up blocks, mobs, and more.
- **Traveler’s Backpack**: Adds mobile storage with unique perks.
- **Fish of Thieves**: Unique aquatic creatures inspired by pirate lore.
- **Trade Cycling**: Lets you refresh villager trades without painful RNG.
- **Infinite Trading**: No more locked-out trades.
## 🧱 Building & Visual Additions
- **Enchanted Vertical Slabs**: More building possibilities.
- **From The Fog**: Creepy visual ambiance based on alpha Minecraft legends.
## 🎮 Multiplayer & Utility
- Voice chat support via **Simple Voice Chat**
  

## ⚠️ Manual Installation Required
To fully experience the pack, please manually download the following external mod:
> 🧭 **DayCounter** — https://modrinth.com/datapack/daycounter and place it in the `mods` folder.

This mod could not be bundled due to licensing restrictions.

---

## 🔧 Technical Info
- Minecraft Version: `1.21.4`
- Modloader: Fabric
- Compatible with both **singleplayer and dedicated servers**

---

## 💬 Need Help?
Check the README in the pack folder for setup help or mod credits.
